titleStmt.title: SII 6.692: original edition by K. V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 692. (A.R. No. 241 of 1899). AT THE ENTRANCE INTO THE KALYANA-MANDAPA OF THE LAKSHMI-NARASIMHASVAMIN TEMPLE AT SIMHACHALAM (VIZIANAGRAM ESTATE), VIZAGAPATAM TALUK AND DISTRICT.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . śākābdē vasunāgabhūśaśimitē śrīmānasākhyānvayā śrīmaṁggīśvaravallabhā guṇavatī lakṣmīti nāmōjvalā . śrīsiṁhyādripatē¨rnṛsiṁhyavapuṣō dīpadvayā¨rtthaṁ ddadau
grāmammaṇḍapanāmadhēyamamalaṁ gō paṁcchaviṁśadvayaṁ . svasti śakava¨rṣaṁbulu 1188 gunēṇṭi mēṣasaṁkrāntimodalugā rāpaṟti maṁggirājula mahādēvulu lakṣmīdēvulu tama koḍku Upēṁdra
rājulaku nāyurārōggyaiśva[¨r*]yyābhivṛddhigā śrīsiṁhyagirināthuni nagariyaṁddu reṁḍu Akhaṁḍadīpamulakuṁgāṁ beṭṭina mōdālu Eṁbhayini 50 Okka dīpadaṁḍunu nīdēva
raku naivēdyā¨rtthamugā nāhaṟupākanāṁḍuṁ gaṭṭulōni maṇapamaneḍi Ūru Ācaṁdrā¨rkkasthāyigāṁ beṭṭe Ī dha¨rmmuvu śrīvaiṣṇava rakṣa . śatruṇāpi kritō dha¨rmma Anu nyāyamu paripāliṁccunadi .
Digital edition of SII 6.692 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
